title: Rename device - Rename, non English language
scenario: Renaming a Poly Bluetooth device with non-English characters (accented letters, non-Latin scripts) does not display correctly across Device Settings, Home Screen, Find My Device, and Support pages
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Poly Bluetooth device connected and the app language set to a non-English language (e.g., French, Spanish, Japanese, Arabic).
2. Navigate to Device Settings → General and tap the device's official name.
3. Verify that the "Rename your Device" pop-up appears.

4. Enter non-English characters (e.g., accented letters like é, ü, ñ; non-Latin scripts like 日本語, 中文, العربية, हिन्दी) into the input field — confirm the characters display properly in the text field.
5. Tap "Done" — confirm the pop-up disappears and the new name with non-English characters is displayed above the device settings.
6. Navigate back to the Home screen — confirm the new name is properly displayed.
7. Go to App Settings → Find My Device — confirm the new name is properly displayed.
8. Go to App Settings → Support → Device — confirm the new name is properly displayed on the support page.
expected: The device name with non-English characters (accented letters, non-Latin scripts) is correctly displayed across all app screens: Device Settings, Home screen, Find My Device, and Support page.
